target.title: fix(ui): scope usage requests by agent filter
target.body:
Fixes #87132.

## Summary
- pass a single selected `agent:<id>` usage query through to `sessions.usage` as `agentId`
- populate the Usage page agent filter from `agents.list` so non-main agents are selectable before their usage sessions are loaded
- reload usage data when the applied query changes the server-side agent scope
- retry without `agentId` and remember legacy compatibility when an older gateway rejects the field

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `pnpm check:test-types`
- `git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.ts ui/src/ui/views/usageTypes.ts ui/src/ui/app-render-usage-tab.test.ts ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/usage.test.ts`

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed**: The Control UI Usage page rendered an agent filter but `loadUsage` always called `sessions.usage` without `agentId`, so the gateway scoped omitted requests to the default/main agent and non-main usage could not be loaded from that filter. This patch also preserves older-gateway compatibility by detecting and caching unsupported `agentId` rejection.

**Real environment tested**: Local openclaw checkout at head `0a4a020cb32f64246b85b150a192cb3b38098cc2` on Linux with the repository UI controller and Usage view tests.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch**: `HEAD=$(git rev-parse HEAD) node --import tsx -e 'import { resolveUsageAgentIdFromQuery, __test as testApi } from "./ui/src/ui/controllers/usage.ts"; const query = "agent:research"; console.log(`head=${process.env.HEAD}`); console.log(`${query} => ${resolveUsageAgentIdFromQuery(query) ?? "<none>"}`); console.log(`agent fallback detector => ${testApi.isLegacyUsageAgentUnsupportedError(new Error("invalid sessions.usage params: at root: unexpected property '''agentId'''"))}`);'`

**Evidence after fix**:
```text
head=0a4a020cb32f64246b85b150a192cb3b38098cc2
agent:research => research
agent fallback detector => true
```

**Observed result after fix**: A single concrete `agent:research` Usage query resolves to `research`, which `loadUsage` includes as `agentId` in `sessions.usage` unless the gateway has been remembered as legacy-incompatible; the same controller detects an older gateway's `agentId` validation rejection and falls back to client-side filtering.

**What was not tested**: I did not run a live browser against a multi-agent gateway; validation covered the UI controller request payload, legacy retry behavior, Usage tab reload behavior, and rendered agent filter options with local Vitest.
target.author: alix-007
